top_priority.summary: Address 111 high-risk bug source(s), starting with src/background.charToKeyInfo
top_priority.why: 111 functions have structural risk scores above 0.50. These are structurally predisposed to defects: they have high fan-in (changes break many callers), sit in mixed-role clusters (responsibility confusion), or are in junk-drawer files (merge conflicts). Splitting and relocating them reduces defect risk.
steps: Start with src/background.charToKeyInfo (risk 0.68) — mixed-role cluster (responsibility confusion), 72 LOC (7x median), junk-drawer file (multi-concern).
Extract distinct concerns into separate functions with clear input/output contracts.
Add targeted tests for functions with high fan-in — a bug there affects many callers.
Move functions out of junk-drawer files into files matching their cluster's role.
Repeat for the remaining 110 high-risk functions.
